title: Untouchable
description: Simple command to essentially make the player ghost-like disabling all non-essential collisions and disabling all damage.
body:
# Untouchable

- Mobs still detect, follow, and attack you, but deal no damage.
- Arrows and projectiles pass through you visually.
- You can't be physically touched by anything hostile, but they still try to hurt you.

Toggle the untouchable state using the `/untouchable` command.

This is **not** a cheat. You must install this on the server for it to work.
